name: python3-keystone-engine
title: python3-keystone-engine
description:
lightweight assembler framework (Python 3)
This package contains lightweight multi-platform, multi-architecture assembler
framework. It offers some unparalleled features:
.
*  Multi-architecture, with support for Arm, Arm64 (AArch64/Armv8), Ethereum
Virtual Machine, Hexagon, Mips, PowerPC, RISC-V, Sparc, SystemZ & X86
(include 16/32/64bit)
*  Clean/simple/lightweight/intuitive architecture-neutral API
*  Implemented in C/C++ languages, with bindings for Java, Masm, C#,
PowerShell, Perl, Python, NodeJS, Ruby, Go, Rust, Haskell, VB6 & OCaml
available
*  Native support for Windows & *nix (with Mac OSX, Linux, *BSD & Solaris
confirmed)
*  Thread-safe by design
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-keystone-engine because lightweight assembler framework (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-keystone-engine as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-keystone-engine with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-keystone-engine --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
